analysis.summary: The US and Israel are engaged in an active military conflict with Iran, now 19 days in, involving strikes on nuclear facilities, energy infrastructure, and assassinations of senior Iranian officials. Iran has retaliated with missile barrages targeting Israel and Gulf energy facilities, while the conflict has triggered oil price surges, diplomatic fallout with European allies and NATO, and domestic political controversy in the US over the war's justification. Intelligence officials face congressional scrutiny over whether Iran posed an imminent nuclear threat prior to the conflict.
